question: If f(x) = 5x² + 4x + -4, what is the value of f(x) when the function reaches its minimum or maximum value?
explanation: For a quadratic f(x) = ax² + bx + c, the vertex is at x = -b/(2a) = -0.40. Substituting back: f(-0.40) = 5(-0.40)² + 4(-0.40) + -4 = -4.80
